name: This Is Not Your House
short_description: Crush someone's skull, Suffer from Hypothermia, Transcend your Mortal Frame, Find all 10 Endings. GET YOUR HOUSE BACK.
detailed_description:
THIS IS NOT YOUR HOUSE: A Psychological Horror Choose Your Own Adventure game with ten endings.

You will take on the role of Roger; an elderly widower returning home from an afternoon of errands; only to discover his locks have been changed, and someone else is living in his house.

Take Your House Back, or let the intruder keep it and find another way to survive without your most basic need, SHELTER.


The game is a Choose Your Own Adventure Visual Novel where you will make a series of branching choices which will lead to one of ten unique endings.

On repeat playthroughs you will have the option to Skip any part of the story you've already been through and be taken immediately to the next choice in the story. Making it more convenient to do multiple playthroughs and find all the endings.

Pressing the "V" button in-game activates a Screen Reader which will tell you what button your cursor is hovering over, as well as reading in-game dialogue, narration, and choice buttons to you.
